afterLogin.spBalance: SP balance: 30 / Paid: 0 / Bonus: 30 / Choice cost: 1 / Free text cost: 3

sessionInitial.currentChapter: The opening chapter of GESTALOKA: Nexus Foundation is still gathering momentum around the opening request.
sessionInitial.currentScene: Nexus Gate is still establishing who can be trusted with the current request. The scene has room to breathe, but it still remembers what was just set in motion.
sessionInitial.activeQuest: クエスト First Stabilizer Request 0/2 Help a local and return with what you learned around Lift Tower Concourse.
sessionInitial.figures: Gate Steward Rikka Gate Steward Rikka keeps to the local district as the gate_steward, carrying a medium edge while the scene reads as neutral.
sessionInitial.routes: Lift Tower Concourse The tower concourse opens above the gate, where public testimony and route ledgers meet. Oblivion Breach The breach route stays sealed until Nexus recognizes the writ.
sessionInitial.factionStanding: Returner Cell -0.10 neutralRelic Salvagers 0.00 neutralKronos Exchange 0.00 neutralMemory Church 0.00 neutralNexus Custodians 0.00 neutral
sessionInitial.choiceList: Watch Nexus Gate without disturbing the flow Read the room and avoid disrupting the scene. Help the person in need and create the next opening Take the clearest forward action for the current request. Go to Lift Tower Concourse and check the old records Change places and widen the investigation.
